Inter spent close to €200 million on incoming transfers this season according to a report from Italian news outlet Calcio e Finanza, who have seen official documents from Inter regarding transfer expenditure.

Inter’s biggest transfer expenditure came in the deal that brought Romelu Lukaku to the club from Premier League side Manchester United. Inter paid a total of €74.162 million on the Belgian.

Inter’s next biggest signing was the €40.5 million signing of Nicolo Barella and Christian Eriksen rounds off the top three with him costing the club €27.567 million.

The Nerazzurri club also paid €10.624 million to sign Ionut Andrei Radu from Genoa, €4.5 million on Lucien Agoume from Sochuax, €2.4 million on Martin Satriano from Club Nacional and €1.729 million on Ashley Young from Manchester United.These transfers total €161.5 million and with €23 million on signings for the Primavera plus the €2 million loan fee for Stefano Sensi and €213,000 loan fee for Victor Moses, Inter’s total spending exceeded the €180 million mark.

quote.msg:
https://twitter.com/_FedeNerazzurra

Conte: “The course that these players have taken this season gives me great satisfaction. Best defense, second best attack, 82 points which we hadn’t seen in a long time, least amount of defeats. All of that is thanks to these players.”

Conte: “There is a gap with Juventus, a major one, there’s little to say about that. We did our duty in the league and improved a lot.”

Conte: “It was a hard year for me and now let’s try to make good impression in Europa League. I thank the players who have done so much this year.”

Conte: “I will make my assessments at the end of the season and the club will make theirs. Everyone must be on the same page. Everything will be evaluated.”

Conte: “I’ve seen attacks against me and Inter. And there is little protection from the club. And so, the players and I will enjoy these 82 points. With all due respect to others. Myself, my coaching staff and the players.”

Conte: “The median gap with Juventus in these past 8 years was 25 points. And we managed to get all of that down. This year, they killed me and the players. And I enjoyed none of that. To win, we must be strong in and off the pitch.”

Conte: “I was brought here for a winning project. At the end of the season, I will speak on what did not go well. Evaluations will be made because there are many things that I didn’t like. Zero protection for the players and coach. Absolutely zero (hand gesture seen in pic).”

Conte: “They sent me an interview with Spaletti who said very serious things. We are in 2020 and are still back to that.”

Conte: “If we want to reduce the gap with Juventus, we need to grow on the pitch and more importantly off of it. There’s a huge margin for growth here. Now, we will see if there’s an understanding that improvements must be made and if ownership understands it.”

我就好滿意干地今季既表現（就叫做階段性勝性）成功由4後衛轉3後衛，亦叫做公開多謝球員，職員既付出。

國米一直受傳媒壓力，流言滿天飛，直至今日，我都未見到有球員，或佢地既經理人放風 diu 9 干地，我諗佢地關係唔會太差。我就想干地繼續教落去，應該仲有上升既空間，分手就太可惜。
